ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCOIS, DOMINIQUE HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON $1533 MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $50 THROUGH VENMO ON THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH, 30 PAYMENTS OVER 2.5 YEARS. IF PAYMENT IS MISSED THEN JUDGMENT IS DUE IN FULL.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Dominique Francois, Appellant/Defendant, is present;
Alex King, Respondent/Plaintiff, is present;

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Alex King testifies on his own behalf. No further evidence is introduced.

Dominique Francois testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Copy of letter from Derek Dong.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: William Trupek, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-16-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM

Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Continued To May-06-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
